ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood's central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood's central point */,
  "cluster_label" INTEGER /* Cluster label assigned to the neighborhood based on venue types */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sqkm" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the neighborhood was established */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_cluster_label FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_label") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster characteristics */,
  "number_of_neighborhoods" INTEGER /* Number of neighborhoods in the cluster */,
  "average_population" REAL /* Average population of neighborhoods in the cluster */,
  "average_median_income" REAL /* Average median income of neighborhoods in the cluster */,
  "average_safety_rating" REAL /* Average safety rating of neighborhoods in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the venue */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the venue is located */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was established */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue category */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of venues in this category */,
  "total_venues" INTEGER /* Total number of venues in this category */,
  "popular_times" TEXT /* Popular times for venues in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "common_venues" (
  "common_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common venue entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the common venue (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "venue_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of venues of this category in the neighborhood */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of venues of this category in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_common_venues_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_common_venues_venue_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_category_id") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being analyzed */,
  "total_venues" INTEGER /* Total number of venues in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of venues in the neighborhood */,
  "most_common_venue" TEXT /* Most common venue category in the neighborhood */,
  "least_common_venue" TEXT /* Least common venue category in the neighborhood */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "economic_index" REAL /* Economic health index of the neighborhood */,
  "safety_index" REAL /* Safety index of the neighborhood */,
  "environmental_index" REAL /* Environmental health index of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_analysis_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the venue (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., user, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_images_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is happening */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of tickets, if applicable */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the event is happening */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of tickets, if applicable */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_events_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is accessible to people with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_facilities_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
